zh.lifeSummary: Jörgen Nilsson是Nils Jägerhorn af Spurila和Kjerstin Petersdotter af Spurila的兒子，出生。他與Mrs. Jörgen結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Jörgen Nilsson是Nils Jägerhorn af Spurila和Kjerstin Petersdotter af Spurila的儿子，出生。他与Mrs. Jörgen结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。

nameMeanings.name: Nilsson
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Erik, Lars, Nils, Per, Anders, Egil, Lennart, Sven, Birgit, Fredrik, Sten, Algot.  German Kurt, Hans, Otto, Gerhard, Gotthard, Karl-Heinz.
Swedish and German: patronymic from the personal name Nils, a shortened form of Nikolaus. Compare Nilson , Neilson 3, and Nielson 2.

variants.name: Nilson
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Nils, Erik, Alvar, Holger, Kristoffer, Mats, Sven.
Americanized form (and a rare Swedish variant) of Swedish   Nilsson  .
Americanized form of Norwegian   Nilsen   and of Danish, Norwegian, or North German   Nielsen  , all cognates of 1. Compare   Nielson  .

nameMeanings.name: Jörgen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Via Old French and Latin, from Greek Georgios (a derivative of geōrgos ‘farmer’, from gē ‘earth’ + ergein ‘to work’). This was the name of several early saints, including the shadowy figure who is now the patron of England (as well as of Germany and Portugal). If the saint existed at all, he was perhaps martyred in Palestine in the persecutions of Christians instigated by the Emperor Diocletian at the beginning of the 4th century. The popular legend in which the hero slays a dragon is a medieval Italian invention. He was for a long time a more important saint in the Orthodox Church than in the West, and the name was not much used in England during the Middle Ages, even after St George came to be regarded as the patron of England in the 14th century. Its use increased from the 1400s, and by 1500 it was regularly among the most popular male names. This popularity was reinforced when George I came to the throne in 1714 , bringing this name with him from Germany. It has been one of the most popular English boys' names ever since.

en.lifeSummary: Jörgen Nilsson was born as the son of Nils Jägerhorn af Spurila and Kjerstin Petersdotter af Spurila. He married Mrs. Jörgen. They were the parents of at least 1 son.

fr.lifeSummary: Jörgen Nilsson est né, fils de Nils Jägerhorn af Spurila et Kjerstin Petersdotter af Spurila. Il a épousé Mrs. Jörgen. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils.

de.lifeSummary: Jörgen Nilsson wurde, als Sohn von Nils Jägerhorn af Spurila und Kjerstin Petersdotter af Spurila geboren. Er hat Mrs. Jörgen geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn.

it.lifeSummary: Jörgen Nilsson è nato il come figlio di Nils Jägerhorn af Spurila e Kjerstin Petersdotter af Spurila. Lui sposato Mrs. Jörgen. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio.

ja.lifeSummary: Jörgen NilssonはNils Jägerhorn af SpurilaとKjerstin Petersdotter af Spurilaの息子として生まれた。Mrs. Jörgenと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Jörgen Nilsson(은)는 Nils Jägerhorn af Spurila(와)과 Kjerstin Petersdotter af Spurila의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 Mrs. Jörgen(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Jörgen Nilsson nasceu filho de Nils Jägerhorn af Spurila e Kjerstin Petersdotter af Spurila. Ele casou-se com Mrs. Jörgen. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho.

ru.lifeSummary: Jörgen Nilsson родился. Его родителей звали Nils Jägerhorn af Spurila и Kjerstin Petersdotter af Spurila. Он женился на женщине по имени Mrs. Jörgen. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын.

es.lifeSummary: Jörgen Nilsson nació como hijo de Nils Jägerhorn af Spurila y Kjerstin Petersdotter af Spurila. Se casó con Mrs. Jörgen. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo.
